note: Archival mirror of runtime media after image audit (2026-07-14).

media.caption: DVIDS frame capture from DOW-UAP-PR28: SWIR sensor footage showing the inverted-teardrop/diamond-shaped area of contrast over Greece, January 2024 (DoD/AARO via DVIDS).
Thumbnail of the declassified mission report DOW-UAP-D25 detailing the Greece January 2024 UAP encounter: diamond-shaped object, ~434 knots, SWIR-only detection (USCENTCOM/AARO).
Direct DoD video file (1m05s): DOW-UAP-PR28 multi-sensor footage (EO + SWIR) of the diamond-shaped UAP over Greece, January 2024. Object visible only in SWIR; lost when switching to visible spectrum.
Official DVIDS page for DOW-UAP-PR28: unresolved UAP report submitted by USCENTCOM to AARO.
